meta.description: Per-user OAuth2 access to Google Drive (read-only). Self-registers an OAuth callback endpoint.

manifest.title: Google Workspace
manifest.author: Adam Smith
manifest.description: Per-user, per-chat OAuth2 access to Google Workspace APIs. Ephemeral tokens — every chat starts unauthorized. Admin valves control which capabilities are available. Uses OWUI event emitters for self-contained OAuth authorization.

specs.name: gws_action
specs.description:
Execute a Google Workspace action. Available actions (subject to admin-enabled capabilities):

CALENDAR:
  calendar.calendars.list (requires calendar.readonly): List the user's calendars
  calendar.events.create (requires calendar.events): Create a calendar event
  calendar.events.delete (requires calendar.events): Delete a calendar event
  calendar.events.get (requires calendar.readonly): Get full details of a calendar event
  calendar.events.list (requires calendar.readonly): List or search calendar events
  calendar.events.patch (requires calendar.events): Update specific fields of an event
  calendar.freebusy.query (requires calendar.readonly): Check free/busy status
DRIVE:
  drive.files.get (requires drive.readonly): Read a Drive file
  drive.files.list (requires drive.readonly): List folder contents
  drive.files.search (requires drive.readonly): Search Drive files
GMAIL:
  gmail.drafts.create (requires gmail.compose): Create a Gmail draft (does NOT send)
  gmail.drafts.get (requires gmail.readonly): Read a specific draft
  gmail.drafts.list (requires gmail.readonly): List Gmail drafts
  gmail.messages.get (requires gmail.readonly): Read a message
  gmail.messages.search (requires gmail.readonly): Search messages
  gmail.threads.get (requires gmail.readonly): Read all messages in a thread
  gmail.threads.list (requires gmail.readonly): Search threads
SHEETS:
  sheets.spreadsheets.get (requires spreadsheets.readonly): Get spreadsheet metadata
  sheets.values.append (requires spreadsheets): Append rows
  sheets.values.batchGet (requires spreadsheets.readonly): Read multiple cell ranges
  sheets.values.get (requires spreadsheets.readonly): Read a cell range
  sheets.values.update (requires spreadsheets): Write values to a cell range

specs.name: gws_authorize
specs.description: Request Google Workspace authorization for this chat, or inspect current authorization status. If capabilities is empty, returns current status. If non-empty, initiates an OAuth flow.

capabilities.description: Comma-separated capabilities to authorize (e.g. 'drive.readonly' or 'drive.readonly,calendar.readonly'). Leave empty to check status.
